title: HydraR: Stateful Agentic Orchestration for Scientific Reproducibility
description: A high-performance framework for orchestrating complex agentic workflows in R, specifically designed for scientific reproducibility and auditability. HydraR provides a robust, state-managed engine for Directed Acyclic Graphs (DAGs) and iterative state machines, prioritizing CLI-native LLM interactions and hardened state persistence (DuckDB/SQLite). It features isolated execution via Git Worktrees for parallel file-modifying tasks, autonomous quality control through integrated auditors, and human-readable visualization using Mermaid.js.
